---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new command, surface, or automation flow
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What workflow is missing or too painful today?

## Proposed solution

Describe the command, flags, or behavior you want.

## Why it belongs in lovagentic

Explain why this should live in the CLI rather than in Lovable itself or a one-off script.

## Additional context

Examples, screenshots, or comparable tools.
